name: Owlbear
description:
### Special Abilities
[{"name":"Keen Sight and Smell","description":"The owlbear has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight or smell."}]

### Actions
[{"name":"Multiattack","description":"The owlbear makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its claws."},{"name":"Beak","description":"Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage."},{"name":"Claws","description":"Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) slashing damage."}]
